节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: X-coordinate
Y-coordinate
Z-coordinate

Execution frequency of the callback function for listening to acceleration sensor data. Available values are as follows: 1. game: Extremely high frequency (20 ms per callback), which is applicable to gaming. 2. ui: High frequency (60 ms per callback), which is applicable to UI updating. 3. normal: Regular frequency (200 ms per callback), which is application to low power consumption. The default value is normal.
Called when acceleration sensor data changes.
Called when the listening fails.
Direction of the device (in degrees).
Called when compass sensor data changes.
Called when the listening fails.
Distance between a visible object and the device screen
Called when distance sensor data changes.
Called when the listening fails.
Light intensity, in lux.
Called when ambient light sensor data changes.
Called when the listening fails.
Number of steps counted. Each time the device restarts, the value is recalculated from 0 in phone, tablet.
Called when step counter sensor data changes.
Called when the listening fails.
Pressure, in hpa.
Called when the barometer sensor data changes.
Called when the listening fails.
Heart rate. 255 indicates an invalid value in lite wearable.
Called when the heart rate sensor data changes.
Called when the listening fails
Whether the sensor is worn.
Called when the wearing status changes.
Called when the listening fails.
Called when the sensor wearing state is obtained
Called when the sensor wearing state fails to be obtained
Called when the execution is completed
alpha
beta
gamma

Execution frequency of the callback function for listening to device orientation sensor data. Available values are as follows: 1. game: Extremely high frequency (20 ms per callback), which is applicable to gaming. 2. ui: High frequency (60 ms per callback), which is applicable to UI updating. 3. normal: Regular frequency (200 ms per callback), which is application to low power consumption. The default value is normal.
Called when device orientation sensor data changes.
Called when the listening fails.
X-coordinate

Execution frequency of the callback function for listening to gyroscope sensor data. Available values are as follows: 1. game: Extremely high frequency (20 ms per callback), which is applicable to gaming. 2. ui: High frequency (60 ms per callback), which is applicable to UI updating. 3. normal: Regular frequency (200 ms per callback), which is application to low power consumption. The default value is normal.
Called when gyroscope sensor data changes.
Called when the listening fails.
Listens to acceleration sensor data changes. If this API is called multiple times, the last call takes effect.
Cancels listening to acceleration sensor data.
Listens to compass sensor data changes. If this API is called multiple times, the last call takes effect.
Cancels listening to compass sensor data.
Listens to distance sensor data changes. If this API is called multiple times, the last call takes effect.
Cancels listening to distance sensor data.
Listens to ambient light sensor data changes. If this API is called multiple times, the last call takes effect.
Cancels listening to ambient light sensor data.
Listens to step counter sensor data changes. If this API is called multiple times, the last call takes effect.
Cancels listening to step counter sensor data.
Listens to barometer sensor data changes. If this API is called multiple times, the last call takes effect.
Cancels listening to barometer sensor data.
Listens to changes of heart rate sensor data. If this API is called multiple times, the last call takes effect.
Cancels listening to heart rate sensor data.
Listens to whether a sensor is worn. If this API is called multiple times, the last call takes effect.
Cancels listening to whether the sensor is worn.
Obtains the sensor wearing state.
Listens to device orientation sensor data changes. If this API is called multiple times, the last call takes effect.
Cancels listening to device orientation sensor data.
Listens to gyroscope sensor data changes. If this API is called multiple times, the last call takes effect.
Cancels listening to gyroscope sensor data.
